headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://maps.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://maps.gstatic.com https://maps.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:3000 https://maps.googleapis.com;
